catalog_content:
Item Name: Once Again Natural, Creamy Peanut Butter, 9lb Bucket (same as 9 jars) - Lightly Salted, Unsweetened - Gluten Free Certified, Vegan, Kosher, Non-GMO Verified Bullet Point 1: CREAMY PEANUT BUTTER || 9 lbs deliciously creamy, natural peanut butter. Our peanut butter is made by roasting and grinding blanched, dry roasted peanuts until they are wonderfully creamy. Contains Peanuts. Produced in a Peanut-only facility Bullet Point 2: LIGHTLY SALTED, UNSWEETENED || This product contains peanuts, with a hint of salt to bring out the exquisitely roasted flavor. Unsweetened Bullet Point 3: ETHICALLY SOURCED || Our peanuts are sourced from Nicaragua, Argentina and the USA Bullet Point 4: CERTIFIED || Gluten Free Certified, Vegan, Kosher, Non-GMO Verified. No added preservatives Product Description: Natural, Creamy Peanut Butter - Lightly Salted, Unsweetened - 9lb Bucket

Our natural peanut butter is made by roasting and grinding blanched, dry roasted peanuts until they are wonderfully creamy. We then add a hint of salt to bring out the exquisitely roasted flavor. Unsweetened. Peanuts are ethically sourced from Argentina, Nicaragua and the USA. Honest in Trade, Gluten-Free Certified, Vegan, Kosher Certified, and Non-GMO Verified. No preservatives added.

Packaged in a 9lb plastic bucket.

While refrigeration of this product isn't necessary, if stirring is something you wish to minimize, stir and then refrigerate. Please be aware that if left out at room temperature, natural oil separation will occur.
Shelf life: 12 months from the date of production. Once opened, we recommend a three month shelf life. We cannot guarantee product performance past the sell-by date as we do not add preservatives to our products.

Ingredients: Peanuts and salt.

Allergen Statement:
Contains Peanuts. Produced in a Peanut-only facility. Value: 144.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Mid-range natural peanut butter with multiple certifications (gluten-free, vegan, kosher, non-GMO) and ethical sourcing. Large 9lb bulk packaging suggests value pricing, though premium positioning is limited by lack of organic or specialty claims. Plastic bucket packaging is practical but not luxury-tier.

Item Name: Fresh Roasted Coffee, Organic Peru Water Processed Half-Caf, 2 lb (32 oz), Mold & Mycotoxin Tested, Medium Roast, Ground
Bullet Point 1: Fresh Roasted Coffee roasts on Loring SmartRoasters which provide superior flavor, use less fuel, and produce fewer emissions than traditional roasters. Rising in 2024, our advanced solar array will help us become one of the cleanest commercial roasters in the country.
Bullet Point 2: Fresh Roasted Coffee nitrogen flushes every coffee bag and pod to remove flavor-stealing oxygen and keep your coffee at its freshest and best tasting for as long as possible. We offer more than 80 varieties of whole bean and ground coffee, coffee pods, and unroasted coffee.

Product Description: Get the rich and indulgent flavor of Peruvian coffee with half of the caffeine. This half caf coffee offering is a combination of our FTO Peru and our FTO Peruvian Water Decaf. With chocolate, almond and orange flavor notes, this cup is refreshing and surprisingly smooth.
